steps.title: Spot the defining contrast
steps.content: The key phrase is “comparatively little notice,” explicitly describing how much attention below sea level research has received. The “though” structure signals that high altitude research must be characterized as the opposite of this neglect.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
The contrast structure (though) tells us high-altitude research has received a lot of attention, in contrast to the comparatively little notice given to below-sea-level research. The blank needs a word meaning abundant or extensive. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — preliminary: early-stage; describes status, not amount of research. ✗
  • Choice B — sporadic: occurring irregularly; describes less research, but the contrast requires more. ✗
  • Choice C — equivocal: ambiguous or open to interpretation; describes quality of conclusions, not quantity. ✗
  • Choice D — copious: abundant, plentiful; directly contrasts with the "comparatively little notice" given to the other topic. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
